name: Sonria Dentista
tagline: Healthy smiles for the whole family

hero.title: Dental care that feels like home
hero.subtitle: Bilingual family dental care led by Dr. Deepti Namineni. Implants, orthodontics, and same-day visits across Arlington, Grand Prairie, Paris, and Commerce — over 1,500 5-star Google reviews.
hero.imageAlt: Family smiling at the dental office

services.heading: Care for the whole family
services.subheading: From your child's first cleaning to dental implants and advanced care, all under one roof.

list.name: General dentistry
list.blurb: Cleanings, exams, fillings, and preventive care for every age.
list.longBlurb: General dentistry is the foundation of a healthy smile. At Sonria we care for kids, adults, and seniors with comprehensive preventive care and restorative treatments when needed.
list.whatIsIt: General dentistry covers professional cleanings, annual exams with digital X-rays, tooth-colored composite fillings, fluoride treatments, sealants, and oral hygiene education.

fourSteps.title: Comprehensive exam
fourSteps.body: We check teeth, gums, bite, and X-rays to catch issues early.

fourSteps.title: Professional cleaning
fourSteps.body: We remove plaque and tartar, polish the teeth, and apply fluoride if needed.

fourSteps.title: Personalized plan
fourSteps.body: We explain in English or Spanish what you need, when, and how much it costs.

fourSteps.title: Ongoing care
fourSteps.body: We remind you of your next visit and support you between appointments with clear advice.

benefits: Better overall health (oral health affects the heart)
list.whyChoose: Our bilingual team takes the time you need, explains every step, and never recommends treatment you don't need. The whole family can be seen in a single visit.

faqs.q: How often should I see the dentist?
faqs.a: Every 6 months for cleanings and exams, though some patients with risk factors may need more frequent visits.
Yes, starting at the first tooth. We make first visits fun and educational.
We accept most PPO plans. Call us with your info and we verify coverage at no charge.

list.seoTitle: General Dentistry in Arlington TX | Cleanings + Exams
list.seoDescription: Cleanings, exams, fillings, and bilingual preventive care in Arlington, Commerce, Paris, and Grand Prairie TX. Call (682) 284-1120.

list.name: Dental implants
list.blurb: Replace missing teeth with natural-looking implants. From $2,499 per tooth.
list.longBlurb: A dental implant replaces the root of a missing tooth with a titanium post that fuses with the bone, then is topped with a ceramic crown that looks and works like a natural tooth.
list.whatIsIt: Dental implants are the most durable way to replace one or more missing teeth. Unlike a bridge or denture, an implant preserves bone and doesn't affect neighboring teeth.

fourSteps.title: Consult and 3D X-rays
fourSteps.body: We assess your bone, gums, and overall health to confirm you're a candidate.

fourSteps.title: Implant placement
fourSteps.body: Outpatient procedure with local anesthesia. Most patients return to work the next day.

fourSteps.title: Integration period
fourSteps.body: Bone grows around the implant for 3 to 6 months. We give you a temporary tooth.

fourSteps.title: Final crown
fourSteps.body: We place the permanent ceramic crown, custom-matched to your tooth color.

benefits: Looks and feels like a natural tooth
Lasts 25 years or more with proper care
list.whyChoose: We place hundreds of implants per year and offer the most honest all-inclusive price in North Texas: $2,499 per complete implant. No surprises. Financing available.

faqs.a: Far less than people expect. Most patients only need ibuprofen for one or two days.

faqs.q: How long does the whole process take?
faqs.a: Start to finish, 3 to 6 months. Bone integration is the longest stage but doesn't require frequent visits.

faqs.q: Am I a candidate if I have low bone?
faqs.a: In many cases we can do a minor bone graft. The initial consult confirms your options.
Titanium implant, abutment, and ceramic crown. All of it. Extra only applies if you need a graft.

list.seoDescription: Dental implants in Arlington TX from $2,499 all-inclusive. Bilingual team, financing available. Call (682) 284-1120.

list.name: All-on-4
list.blurb: Full fixed smile on 4 implants in a single day. $15,999 per arch.
list.longBlurb: All-on-4 replaces a full arch of teeth with just 4 strategically placed implants, supporting a fixed prosthesis that feels and works like natural teeth.
list.whatIsIt: It's the ideal solution for patients who have lost most or all of their teeth, or who are tired of removable dentures. The prosthesis screws onto the implants and only the dentist removes it.

fourSteps.title: 3D evaluation and plan
fourSteps.body: We take a CBCT scan and digitally design the position of all 4 implants.

fourSteps.title: Same-day surgery
fourSteps.body: We extract remaining teeth, place the 4 implants, and a temporary prosthesis, all in one day.

fourSteps.title: Guided recovery
fourSteps.body: You leave with functional teeth. We give clear soft-food guidance for 4 to 6 months.

fourSteps.title: Final prosthesis
fourSteps.body: After integration, we place the permanent prosthesis designed to last decades.

benefits: Fixed smile the same day, no waiting
Far more stable than traditional dentures
list.whyChoose: Our team places All-on-4 every week. We have an in-office dental lab so the prosthesis fits perfectly. Flat $15,999 per arch includes everything.

faqs.q: Can I really leave with teeth the same day?
faqs.a: Yes. You leave with the temporary prosthesis the same day as surgery. The final one comes months later.

faqs.q: Does it work if I still have some teeth?
faqs.a: Yes. If remaining teeth can't be saved or are causing problems, we remove them in the same visit.
Extractions, 4 implants, same-day temporary prosthesis, and the final permanent prosthesis. All of it.
Yes. We work with CareCredit and in-house options. Most patients pay $300-$500 per month.

list.seoTitle: All-on-4 Arlington TX | $15,999 Fixed Smile in a Day
list.seoDescription: All-on-4 in Arlington TX: fixed smile on 4 implants in a single day, $15,999 per arch all-inclusive. (682) 284-1120.

list.name: Orthodontics / Invisalign
list.blurb: Traditional braces or clear aligners for a straighter smile.
list.longBlurb: We offer both traditional braces and Invisalign to correct bite, gaps, and crooked teeth in teens and adults.
list.whatIsIt: Orthodontics moves teeth into ideal position. Invisalign uses clear removable aligners. Traditional braces are fixed and usually more affordable.

fourSteps.title: Consult and digital scan
fourSteps.body: We take photos, X-rays, and a 3D scan of your teeth to design your plan.

fourSteps.title: Treatment plan
fourSteps.body: We show how your teeth will move and how long it'll take. You choose Invisalign or braces.

fourSteps.title: Active treatment
fourSteps.body: You change aligners every 1 to 2 weeks (Invisalign) or we adjust braces every 6 to 8 weeks.

fourSteps.title: Retention
fourSteps.body: Once aligned, you wear a retainer so teeth don't shift back. It's lifelong.

benefits: Better bite (less wear and jaw issues)
Easier to keep aligned teeth clean
list.whyChoose: We're certified Invisalign providers. Flexible pay and no-cost initial consult. Dr. Namineni walks through options so you choose with confidence.

faqs.a: Simple cases: 6 to 9 months. Complex cases: 18 to 24 months. The consult gives a precise estimate.

faqs.q: Does Invisalign really work like braces?
faqs.a: Yes for most cases. For very complex cases we sometimes recommend traditional braces.
Traditional braces: from $3,500. Invisalign: from $4,500. We give a fixed price after the consult.

list.seoTitle: Orthodontics + Invisalign Arlington TX | Braces for Adults and Teens
list.seoDescription: Orthodontics with traditional braces or Invisalign in Arlington TX. Free consult. Flexible pay. (682) 284-1120.

list.name: Cosmetic dentistry
list.blurb: Veneers, professional whitening, and custom smile design.
list.longBlurb: Cosmetic dentistry transforms your smile with porcelain veneers, professional whitening, and smile design tailored to your facial features.
list.whatIsIt: We combine art and science to create a smile that looks natural and proportional to your face. Every case is digitally designed before we touch a single tooth.

fourSteps.title: Design consult
fourSteps.body: We talk about what you'd like to change and show options with a digital design.

fourSteps.title: Preview
fourSteps.body: We make a temporary mock-up in your mouth so you see the new smile before committing.

fourSteps.title: Gentle prep
fourSteps.body: Modern veneers require minimal enamel preparation.

fourSteps.title: Final smile
fourSteps.body: We place the veneers or final treatment, fine-tune color and shape.

benefits: More confidence in photos and conversations
list.whyChoose: We show a digital and temporary preview before any permanent treatment. No surprises. You approve the design before we proceed.

faqs.a: If we do them right, yes. We use layered porcelain that mimics the translucency of a real tooth.

faqs.q: How much does a veneer cost?
faqs.a: From $1,200 per veneer. A full smile design (8-10 veneers) usually runs $9,600-$12,000.
Yes, when done by a dentist. Some patients feel temporary sensitivity that passes in a few days.

list.seoTitle: Cosmetic Dentistry Arlington TX | Veneers + Whitening
list.seoDescription: Veneers, professional whitening, and smile design in Arlington TX. Digital preview, no-pressure consult. (682) 284-1120.

list.name: Emergencies
list.blurb: Sharp pain or a broken tooth? We see you the same day.
list.longBlurb: A dental emergency doesn't wait. We hold space every day for patients with severe pain, broken teeth, infections, or trauma.
list.whatIsIt: We treat toothaches, abscesses, fractured teeth, lost crowns or fillings, sports trauma, and gum bleeding that won't stop.

fourSteps.title: Call (682) 284-1120
fourSteps.body: Talk to our team. We give first steps over the phone and book you a same-day appointment.

fourSteps.title: Arrival and triage
fourSteps.body: We take an X-ray and quick exam to identify the exact cause.

fourSteps.title: Immediate relief
fourSteps.body: We relieve pain with local anesthesia, abscess drainage, or a temporary repair.

fourSteps.title: Plan to follow
fourSteps.body: We explain the steps to fix the problem permanently, with clear pricing.

benefits: Cheaper than the hospital for dental issues
list.whyChoose: We have 4 offices across North Texas, so there's always one nearby. If you call before noon, we almost always see you the same day.

faqs.q: What counts as a dental emergency?
faqs.a: Severe pain, bleeding that won't stop, fractured tooth, or trauma. If unsure, call and we'll guide you.

faqs.q: What do I do if a whole tooth gets knocked out?
faqs.a: Keep it moist (in milk or saliva), don't touch the root, and call us right away. You have 30-60 minutes to reimplant.
Call first, we can almost always see you the same day.

list.seoTitle: Emergency Dentist Arlington TX | Same-Day Care
list.seoDescription: Emergency dentist in Arlington TX. Toothaches, broken teeth, abscesses. Same-day care. (682) 284-1120.

pricingFeatured.label: All-on-4
pricingFeatured.note: Per arch, fixed smile in a day

doctor.name: Dr. Deepti Namineni
doctor.title: Clinical Director, DDS
bio: We opened Sonria more than 15 years ago with a simple idea, give every patient the same care we'd give our own family.
Today we serve thousands of patients across four North Texas offices. We speak Spanish and English, walk through every step, and never recommend treatment you don't need.

about.heading: A family practice, not a chain
about.intro: We started as one office. Today we're four, all run by the same family, with the same commitment to treating every patient like they're our own.
story: Dr. Sandeep Namineni opened Sonria in 2009 with the idea that quality dental care shouldn't depend on the language you speak or the size of your bank account.

Today our bilingual team serves thousands of North Texas families. We keep prices fixed and transparent, financing accessible, and a simple commitment: if you don't need a treatment, we won't recommend it.
Each of our four offices has the same modern technology, the same clinical standard, and the same culture of respect for your time and trust.

values.title: Honesty above all
values.body: Clear posted pricing. If you don't need it, we don't recommend it.

values.title: Truly bilingual
values.body: Whole team, every office, Spanish and English equally.

values.title: Family first
values.body: We treat children through grandparents, all in the same visit if you'd like.

newPatients.heading: Your first visit
newPatients.intro: You're in the right place. Here's exactly what to expect so you arrive at ease.

specialOffer.label: New patient special
specialOffer.note: Comprehensive exam + digital X-rays + personalized consultation. No surprises.

steps.title: Book in 3 minutes
steps.body: Call (682) 284-1120 or use the form. We confirm by SMS.

steps.title: Arrive 10 min early
steps.body: Bring your ID, insurance (if any), and completed forms.

steps.title: Comprehensive exam
steps.body: We take digital X-rays, do a full oral exam, and discuss your history.

steps.title: Clear plan
steps.body: We explain what you need, when, and how much it costs. You decide.

whatToBring: Dental insurance card (if you have one)
newPatients.financing: We accept cash, cards, CareCredit, and in-house no-interest plans up to 12 months. We discuss payments without pressure.

insurance.heading: Insurance and financing
insurance.intro: We accept most PPO plans. If yours isn't on the list, call us, we can almost always see you as out-of-network with similar benefits.
insurance.noInsurance: No insurance? We have an annual membership plan from $199 that includes two cleanings, exams, and discounts on other treatments.

financing.name: CareCredit
financing.body: Medical financing with no-interest plans from 6 to 24 months.

financing.name: Sonria in-house plan
financing.body: Fixed monthly payments, no aggressive credit check.

financing.name: Cash / card
financing.body: 5% discount when you pay up front.

faqs.q: Do you verify my insurance before the visit?
faqs.a: Yes, at no charge. Call us with your info and we verify coverage in under 24 hours.

faqs.q: What if my insurance doesn't cover everything?
faqs.a: We explain exactly what you owe before treatment, with payment options if you can't cover it right away.
Not directly. But we have accessible plans for patients without coverage.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.subheading: What we get asked most, answered in one line.

items.a: Yes. The whole team, in all four offices. Not just the dentist.

items.q: Do you accept patients without insurance?
items.a: Yes. We have new patient specials ($79.99), membership plans ($199/year), and no-interest financing.

items.q: How fast can you see me if I'm in pain?
items.a: Almost always same-day if you call before noon. We hold daily emergency slots.
Yes, starting at the first tooth. We make first visits fun and educational.
Arlington, Commerce, Paris, and Grand Prairie. Same team and pricing at each one.

items.q: How much does an implant cost?
items.a: $2,499 all-inclusive per tooth. No surprises. Financing available.
$15,999 per arch, all-inclusive (extractions, 4 implants, temporary and final prosthesis).
Yes. CareCredit, Sonria in-house plan, or card. Most patients pay $200-500 per month.
Yes. Call (682) 284-1120 and we almost always see you the same day.

contactPage.heading: Contact us
contactPage.subheading: Call, message, or stop by any of our four offices. We respond within one business day.

contactCTA.heading: Ready to book?
contactCTA.body: Call or message us. We speak Spanish and English, and we see same-day patients whenever we can.
